name: Food Escape
short_description: You are food. Escape from the terrifying monsters trying to eat you and reach the exit!
detailed_description:
Title: Food Escape

In this horror escape game, you play as Tamago-sama, the protagonist. To escape from the terrifying monster Mephis, you must react quickly and find escape routes. There is no exploration or combat involved; the focus is solely on running away, making it a simple yet thrilling game. Can you escape safely before becoming the monster's prey?

Gameplay

  • Single-player Horror Escape Game: As food, you dedicate yourself to escaping from being eaten by the monster, aiming for the goal.

  • Thrilling Escape Mechanics: The gameplay demands quick escapes and evasion, without stealth or action elements.

Features

  • Unique dark and eerie art style

  • Real-time changing stage environments

  • Tense BGM and sound effects

  • Earn rank logos prepared for each stage upon clearing them

  • Unlock new stages by clearing the previous ones
